instruction: Explain how the vulnerability is triggered within the application.
input: In Daybyday CRM, version 2.2.0 is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows low privileged application users to store malicious scripts in the title field of new tasks. These scripts are executed in a victim’s browser when they open the “/tasks” page to view all the tasks.
output: The vulnerability is triggered when a malicious script is stored in the title field of a new task by a low privileged user. It executes when any user visits the “/tasks” page, causing the script to run in their browser.
